description: Pinned episode set for longitudinal eval runs (spec #53). Pass to `thestill eval run --episodes-file`. Episodes span 5 podcasts and genres, are short enough that summaries stay single-chunk, and all three artifacts (raw transcript, clean transcript, summary) existed on disk when pinned (2026-07-10). Do not rotate members casually: comparisons across time assume the same inputs.

episodes.why: news format with host+correspondent attribution, ~10 min
opinion essay readout, number-heavy claims, ~15 min
